sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 technique unit. Covers the orator's devices (anaphore, question rhétorique, rythme ternaire, apostrophe, gradation), delivery craft (silence, marteler, envolée, galvaniser), and the device+effect+intention analysis grid, with a speech-analysis reading. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 6 'Eurovisions' (relever les procédés de l'art oratoire; interpréter des formulations; étudier les ressorts d'un propos militant). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
